items.claim: Alden Coria is a significantly higher-level fighter than Stuart Nicoll.
items.quote: Alden Coria is on a much higher level than Stuart Nicoll.

items.claim: Stuart Nicoll has shown no specific skills that are high-level in his UFC tenure.
items.quote: there's nothing that I can say, you know, watching these three fights in the UFC that he does all that well.

items.claim: Alden Coria possesses significant punching power for the flyweight division.
items.quote: He can hit hard. He can hit hard at 125 lb

items.claim: Mario Pinto's stock decreased following his win over Felipe Franco due to a boring performance.
items.quote: the stock has gone down a little bit for Mario Pinto, even in a victory, because the fight was so boring

items.claim: Felipe Franco is not a high-quality fighter.
items.quote: I don't think the guy is that good.

items.claim: Levi Rodriguez Jr. tested positive for nandrolone metabolites.
items.quote: it gets revealed that Levy Rodriguez has tested positive for, let me get this right, nandrolone metabolites.

items.claim: Levi Rodriguez Jr. has won all of his professional fights by knockout.
items.quote: nothing but knockouts so far in his career.
